title: SEO Audit Skill - Phase 2 & 3 Websites
summary: Skill for processing Screaming Frog XLSX crawl exports into a full SEO audit suite. Produces three outputs: (1) colour-coded audit XLSX with page type classification, issue tagging, keyword inference, content action recommendations, and backlink planning columns; (2) professional strategy PDF report with executive summary, technical findings, content audit, keyword strategy, backlink strategy, and growth plan; (3) optional page-by-page content review PDF written in plain English for client-facing use. Covers 7 phases: setup/processing, technical audit, content audit with colour coding, optional page-level content review, keyword research via Ahrefs, backlink planning via Ahrefs, and growth planning. Includes strict rules for keyword inference (deepest slug + location modifier), page type classification with colour codes, issue prioritisation, and consistent content action terminology. PDF styling uses the Graham SEO brand system: Dark Blue (#1B2A4A) cover and section headers, Accent Blue (#3B7DD8) left bars, Light Blue (#E8EEF6) sub-headers, colour-coded stat boxes, alternating-row tables, and Helvetica typography throughout. Phase 3b includes automated browser screenshot capture with PIL/Pillow visual annotations (red circles, arrows, callout labels) embedded directly in the page-level review PDF.

references.description: Reference PDF used to extract the styling specification

artifacts.description: Complete SEO audit skill definition with all phases, output specifications, detailed PDF styling specification (colour palette, typography, component specs), annotated screenshot workflow, and execution checklist
Example Gen Green audit report PDF used as the visual styling reference
